coach_notes: To build a strong food-service career, focus on developing food safety and time management first, as they are foundational for most roles. You can gain food safety certification through free online courses like ServSafe, and practice time management by setting daily goals during your shifts. Your bilingual skills and customer service experience are huge assets—pair them with these missing skills to stand out and advance quickly.

jobs.title: Vietnamese Interpreter - Louisville, CO
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong bilingual skills (English/Spanish) and customer service experience align with interpreter role. Community events and group instruction show communication and cultural competency.
jobs.gaps: No specific Vietnamese language skills mentioned. If Vietnamese is required, this is a major gap. Also lacks formal interpreter training or certification.

jobs.title: Work From Home - Bilingual Client Services Representative
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Bilingual (English/Spanish) and customer service experience directly match. Work from home fits self-motivation; Google Suite and planning skills support remote work.
jobs.gaps: No specific experience in client services for this industry. May need training on company systems or protocols.

jobs.title: Community Resident Participation Specialist-CEN-25
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Community events, event planning, and group instruction experience directly support resident participation. Bilingual skills and teamwork are assets for community engagement.
jobs.gaps: No direct experience in community resident participation or social services. May need to learn specific program requirements or regulations.

jobs.title: Director Physical Plant Management (Maintenance Director)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: The role requires leadership and management of physical plant operations, which could leverage your planning and teamwork skills. Your bilingual ability may help in diverse teams.
jobs.gaps: No experience in facility management, maintenance, or physical plant operations. Lacks technical knowledge of building systems, safety regulations, and supervisory experience.

jobs.title: Crew Member - Glendale
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Customer service, cash transactions, teamwork, and cleanliness standards align with crew member duties. Bilingual ability helps with diverse customers.
jobs.gaps: No food service or fast-food experience. May need training on specific procedures, food safety, and speed of service.
